description: Criterion schema + tri-state + composite parent grouping types
Unit canonicalization (D5) at seed/eval time
Pure deterministic matcher: per-criterion pass/fail/unknown + tri-state (D1, D3)
Softening simulator with newly-definite / newly-possible split (D2)
Aggregation: counts-only + min-cell (<5) suppression
Funnel discount (R1) + monthly incidence rate (R2) helpers
Hero protocol (real HER2+ mBC archetype) + verified Criterion[] fixture
Hybrid seeded synthetic-data generator: prevalences+correlations, 30-40% biomarker missingness (R3)
Generated 3-site datasets committed to data/
Matcher/soften/aggregate unit tests incl. unknown, exclusion-unknown, softening split, suppression
npm run demo: per-site tri-state counts + hero softening split + funnel-discounted estimate
Prisma schema (Site/Patient/Consultation/ParsedCriteria/Response) + SQLite
Seed script: 3 sites, hero consultation, sites B&C already-responded
Next.js app shell + shared UI (privacy banner, tri-state chips)
Site view: discover consultation, run matcher, submit capacity (Camila live)
Sponsor view: post + aggregated counts + softening toggle
Feasibility scorecard print-CSS view (P1)
README: run-from-scratch, data-provenance note, scoped privacy claim
Parse service: Claude (Opus 4.8) free-text->Criterion[] via structured outputs, cached fallback (ADR 3B)
API routes: /api/parse + /api/consultations (post + auto-seed responses)
Sponsor post flow: paste->parse->verify/correct low-confidence->post
Credibility homework: adversarially-verified pitch stats + NCT verification
Feasibility scorecard region breakdown: SiteMeta.region + aggregateByRegion/regionBreakdown, /sponsor regional table, /scorecard?view=brasil national rollup

Fixed two fragilities found in a live end-to-end test: (a) /scorecard was hardcoded to the hero consultation, now reads ?c=; (b) no-key parse fallback silently attached hero criteria to unrelated protocol text, now nct-gated and throws honestly on mismatch
